changeSet.author: devradar
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO feed_subscriptions (tag_slug, feed_url, title, active) VALUES ('vue', 'https://blog.vuejs.org/feed.rss', 'Vue.js Blog', true), ('angular', 'https://blog.angular.dev/feed', 'Angular Blog', true), ('typescript', 'https://deno.com/blog/rss.xml', 'Deno Blog', true), ('javascript', 'https://deno.com/blog/rss.xml', 'Deno Blog', true), ('open_source', 'https://github.blog/feed/', 'GitHub Blog', true), ('react', 'https://vercel.com/blog/rss.xml', 'Vercel Blog', true), ('frontend', 'https://vercel.com/blog/rss.xml', 'Vercel Blog', true), ('javascript', 'https://nodejs.org/en/feed/blog.xml', 'Node.js Blog', true), ('java', 'https://spring.io/blog.atom', 'Spring Blog', true), ('devops', 'https://blog.cloudflare.com/rss/', 'Cloudflare Blog', true), ('react', 'https://react.dev/blog/rss.xml', 'React Blog', true), ('devops', 'https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/', 'Docker Blog', true), ('devops', 'https://kubernetes.io/feed.xml', 'Kubernetes Blog', true), ('frontend', 'https://blog.vuejs.org/feed.rss', 'Vue.js Blog', true), ('frontend', 'https://blog.angular.dev/feed', 'Angular Blog', true);
